settings.pipeline.heading: transformation pipeline
settings.step.heading: transformation step
settings.logs.description: Logs older than the configured age threshold are automatically deleted once per day, at 2am Central European time. The threshhold is specified by a number and a unit.
channels.column.name: Nom
channels.index.name: Nom
channels.field.id.help: An automatically assigned opaque identifier. Cannot be modified.
channels.field.name: Nom
channels.field.name.help: A name, which should be unique, for users to identify this resource.
channels.field.enabled.help: Checking this will commission the channel. If enabled, you can upload files to the queue, if disabled you can not.
channels.field.transformationPipeline.he: Select the transformation pipeline required to change the input format delivered to this channel into the internal format used by the the Inventory Update process. See Transformation Pipelines in the settings for more details.
jobs.caption.completed: Imported {count, number} {count, plural, one {record} other {records}} in {duration}
pause.failure: Channel {channelName} could not be paused: HTTP status {status}: {body}
resume.failure: Channel {channelName} could not be resumed: HTTP status {status}: {body}

pipeline.steps.name: Nom

logs.countLogLiines: {count, number} {count, plural, one {log line} other {log lines}}
permission.settings.view: Inventory import (Settings): View transformation pipelines, transformation steps, channels and log-file deletion threshold
permission.settings.view-edit: Inventory import (Settings): View, edit transformation pipelines, transformation steps, channels and log-file deletion threshold
permission.settings.view-edit-create: Inventory import (Settings): View, edit, create transformation pipelines, transformation steps and channels
permission.settings.view-edit-create-del: Inventory import (Settings): View, edit, create, delete transformation pipelines, transformation steps and channels

permission.channels.delete: Inventory import: View, edit, create, delete channels

upload.label: Import files
upload.title: Drag files here to import
upload.failure: Could not upload {fileName} to channel {channelName}: HTTP status {status} ({statusText}): {body}
channels.field.listening.help: When this is checked (and the channel is enabled) the channel will pick up any uploaded files from the queue and import them to inventory. If unchecked, uploaded files will just accumulate in the queue for later.
channels.field.commissioned.help: This read-only field indicates whether the channel is commissioned and processing the files in its queue.
